title: Foundation Expert
description: A tech expert modpack with original recipes, quests and progression!
body:
## Foundation Expert

![Foundation Expert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b786c3f993aab9ff6390524f7bd380a60c576d08.jpeg)

Foundation Expert is a technology-focused expert modpack built around progression, automation, and complex engineering challenges.

With 150+ carefully selected Fabric mods, the pack introduces heavily modified recipes, custom progression, and a large questline designed to guide players through a deep and rewarding technological journey.

Every stage of the game pushes you to think bigger, automate more, and design efficient factories.

Even though the modpack is still in development, the current version already offers 200+ hours of gameplay before reaching the current endgame.

### Core Gameplay

Expert Progression
Recipes have been extensively reworked to create meaningful progression. Advancing through the pack requires building automated systems and mastering complex production chains.

Quest-Guided Experience
A large quest system helps guide players through the different technologies while introducing new mechanics and challenges.

Automation at the Center
From early mechanical setups to advanced technological infrastructure, automation is the key to progress.

Optimized Performance
Built entirely on Fabric, the pack runs smoothly even with a large number of mods, making it accessible on many systems.

### Main Mods

Foundation Expert is built around several major technology mods:

- Create – Mechanical engineering and creative automation
- Tech Reborn – Advanced machines and classic tech progression
- Applied Energistics 2 – Digital storage and complex automation networks
- Energized Power – Power generation and electrical systems
- and more!

These mods are deeply integrated through custom recipes and progression, creating a cohesive and unique experience.

### Current Development

The modpack is actively being developed. The current version already contains a large amount of content, but more is planned.

Future updates will include:

- Additional quests and progression stages
- Further recipe balancing
- More integration between mods
- Expanded endgame content

### Who Is This Pack For?

Foundation Expert is designed for players who enjoy:

- Expert-style modpacks
- Factory building
- Complex automation
- Long-term progression
- Solving engineering challenges

If you enjoy building massive automated systems and optimizing production chains, Foundation Expert will push your engineering skills to the limit. Feel free to give suggestions or report bugs here : https://github.com/Konhaiii/Foundation-Expert
